fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer who owns the items on the service order.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of this shipment.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the shipment line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of this shipment line.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location from where inventory items to the customer on the sales document are to be shipped by default.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the posting group used when the service line was posted.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of an item, resource, cost, or a standard text on the service line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description of the item, resource, or cost.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of item units, resource hours, general ledger account payments, or cost that have been shipped to the customer.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip:
Contains the VAT percentage used on the current shipment line.
The program copies VAT % from the VAT % field in the Service Line table when the service order is posted.
You cannot change the value in the field because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the invoice line is included when the invoice discount is calculated.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip:
Contains the gross weight of one unit of the item.
It is used only in connection with the inventory items.
The program copies the value from the Gross Weight field on the service line when you post the shipment.
You cannot change the gross weight because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip:
Contains the net weight of one unit of the item.
It is used only in connection with inventory items.
The program copies the weight from the Net Weight field on the service line when you post the shipment.
You cannot change the value in the field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how many units one parcel of the item on the line contains.
The program copies the quantity from the Units per Parcel field on the service line when you post the shipment.
You cannot change the value in the field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip:
Contains the volume of one unit of the item.
The program copies the value from the Unit Volume field on the service line when you post the shipment.
You cannot change the value in the field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Item Shpt. Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the item entry associated with the service shipment line.
The number is created when the service line is posted and is assigned to the shipment line to provide item tracking. For more information, see How to: Set Up Item Tracking Codes.
The number is only displayed in the table. You cannot change it because the shipment has already been posted.

You cannot change the contents of this field.


Additional Information

If the service shipment line carries multiple unique item tracking numbers when posted, this will result in one item ledger entry for each item tracking number. For such one-to-many relations, the Item Entry Relation table manages the relation to the item ledger entries instead of the Item Shpt. Entry No. field.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the price group that the customer belongs to. The program used the code to calculate the unit price for items on the line.
The customer price group code is copied from the Customer Price Group field on the service line of the service order.
You cannot change the customer price group because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the type of work performed under the posted service order.

fields.name: Qty. Shipped Not Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the shipped item that has been posted as shipped but that has not yet been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service order that this shipment was posted from.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the line number of this line on the service order on which it was created.
You cannot change the order line number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the general business posting group code assigned to the customer whom you send the invoice for the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the service line of the service order.
You cannot change the code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the general product posting group of the item or resource on this line.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field in the Service Line table when the shipment is created from the order.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Indicates which VAT calculation type was used when this line was posted. The program used the VAT calculation type whether to calculate normal VAT, reverse charge VAT, full VAT or a sales tax.
The program copies the code from the VAT Calculation Type field on the service line of the service order you have posted.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the transaction type assigned to the posted service order from which the line was posted. The types of transactions are set up in the Transaction Types window. You use the pre-set types to report your trade with other EU countries/regions (see also INTRASTAT).
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the service line of the service order.
You cannot change the code when the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the transport method used for shipment of the service on the line.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the service line of the order you post.
You cannot change the transport method code when the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the service line to which the line which contains the extended text is attached.
The program copies the number from the Attached to Line No. from the service line that contains the item, resource, cost, G/L account type, or standard text, that is described by the extended text.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the port of exit through which you shipped the service items or resource out of your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Exit Point field on the service line of the service order you post.
You cannot change the code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the area where the customer company is located.
The program copies the code from the Area field in the Service Line table when the service order is posted.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Contains the transaction specification code that was used in the shipment. The code denotes additional information concerning the transaction type on the service order. You use the code to report your trade with other EU countries/regions (see also INTRASTAT).
The program copies the code from the Transaction Specification field on the service line of the service order.
You cannot change the transaction specification code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the tax area where the bill-to customer is located.
In combination with the tax group code, the program uses the value in this field to determine the sales tax % and the G/L accounts for sales tax posting.
The program copies the value from the Tax Area Code field on the service line of the service order.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that items, resources, G/L accounts or costs on the current service shipment line were liable to sales tax.
The program copies the value in the filed from the Tax Liable field in the Service Line table when the order is posted.
You cannot clear the check box in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the tax group code of the item, resource, or cost on the current shipment line.
The program copies the code from the Tax Group Code field on the service line of the service order.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the VAT business posting group of the bill-to customer.
In combination with the VAT Prod. Posting Group value, the program uses the code to determine VAT %, VAT calculation type and the G/L accounts for posting VAT.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the line of the service order. You cannot change the value because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the VAT product posting group of the item, resource or general ledger account on the current line.
The program copies the code from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field on the service line of the service order you post.
The program determines VAT %, VAT calculation type and the G/L accounts for posting VAT on the basis of settings in the VAT Posting Setup window.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for various amounts on the shipment.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip:
Contains the total net amount (amount excluding VAT) on the shipment line.
The program copies the amount from the VAT Base Amount field on the service line of the service order you post.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip:
Contains the cost per unit of an item, resource or cost on the service shipment line. The unit for which the cost is displayed is specified in the Unit of Measure field on the line.
The program copies the field value from the Unit Cost field on the Service Line table when the service order is posted.
The unit cost is displayed in the currency of the sales transaction. If the Currency Code field is blank, the unit cost is expressed in LCY, and therefore, is equal to the value in the Unit Cost (LCY) field.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Time Sheet No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of a time sheet. A number is assigned to each time sheet when it is created. You cannot edit the number.

fields.name: Time Sheet Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of a time sheet line. A number is assigned to each line when it is created. You cannot edit the number.

fields.name: Time Sheet Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the time sheet was created.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip:
Contains the quantity of items per unit of measure specified in the Unit of Measure field on the line.
The program copies the value from the Qty. per Unit of Measure field in the Service Line table when the service order is posted.
You cannot change the value in this field because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity of items, resource time, payments to the general ledger account, or costs on the shipment line. The quantity is expressed in the base units of measure specified in the Unit of Measure field.
The program copies the value from the Quantity (Base) field in the Service Line table when the service order is posted.
You cannot change the quantity in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Qty. Shipped Not Invd. (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Indicates how many units of the item, resource hours, or costs on the line have been shipped but not yet invoiced. The quantity is expressed in base units of measure specified in the Unit of Measure field.
The program copies the value from the Qty. Shipped Not Invd. (Base) field on the service line of the service order you post.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Qty. Invoiced (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the quantity of registered items, resource hours, general ledger account payments, or costs, already invoiced. The quantity in the field is expressed in the base units of measure specified in the Unit of Measure field.
The program copies the value from the Qty. Invoiced (Base) field on the service line when the order is posted.
You cannot change the quantity on the posted shipment.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the responsibility center (for example, a distribution center, a sales office or a plant planning office) assigned to the customer or associated with the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Responsibility Center field on the line of the service order.
You cannot change the responsibility center code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Item Category Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the item category that the item on the line belongs to. Choose the field to view the default values for the posting group, costing method and tax group assigned to the specified item category.
The program copies the code from the Item Category Code field on the service line of the service order.
You cannot change the field value when the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item on the shipment line is a catalog item.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the customer uses in their own system to refer to this service document.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reference information that the customer uses in their own system to refer to this service document.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the service shipment line has been posted as a corrective entry.

fields.name: Appl.-to Warranty Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warranty ledger entry to which the items on the line were applied when the shipment was posted.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item to which this service line is linked.

fields.name: Appl.-to Service Entry
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the service ledger entry which the program applies this line to.
The program copies the number from the Appl.-to Service Entry field on the service line.
You cannot change the number because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Service Item Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item line to which this service line is linked.

fields.name: Service Item Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the service item to which this shipment line is linked.

fields.name: Service Item Line Description
fields.tooltip:
Contains a description of the service item line in the original service document to which this shipment line is linked.
The program copies the value from the Service Item Line Description field on the service line when you post the shipment.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the service line was posted.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related order was created.

fields.name: Needed by Date
fields.tooltip: Contains the date by which you require the item to be available for a service order. This date is stored when you post the service line.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Quantity Consumed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of items, resource hours, general ledger account payments, or costs that have been posted as consumed.

fields.name: Qty. Consumed (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of units of items, resource hours, general ledger account payments, or costs registered on the line that have already been posted as consumed. The quantity is expressed in the base units of measure. The program copies the value from the Qty. Consumed (Base) field on the service line of the original service order.
You cannot change the value in the field manually because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Service Price Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the Service Price Group of the service item that corresponds to the current service line.
The program copies the code from the Service Price Group Code field on the service line.

fields.name: Fault Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the fault area associated with this service line.

fields.name: Symptom Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the symptom associated with this service shipment line.

fields.name: Fault Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fault code associated with this service shipment line.

fields.name: Resolution Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the resolution associated with this service shipment line.

fields.name: Exclude Warranty
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the warranty discount is excluded on this service shipment line.

fields.name: Warranty
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a warranty discount is available on this service shipment line of type Item or Resource.

fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contract associated with the posted service order.

fields.name: Contract Disc. %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contract discount percentage valid for the items, resources, and costs on the service shipment line.

fields.name: Warranty Disc. %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the warranty discount valid for the items or resources on the service shipment line.

fields.name: Component Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line in the Service Item Component List window.

fields.name: Spare Part Action
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the item has been used to replace the whole service item, one of the service item components, installed as a new component, or as a supplementary tool in the service process.

fields.name: Fault Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the fault reason for the service shipment line.

fields.name: Replaced Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item component replaced by the item on the service line.

fields.name: Exclude Contract Discount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the contract discount is excluded for the item, resource or cost on the current service shipment line.
The program copies the information from the Exclude Contract Discount field in the Service Line table when the service order is posted.

fields.name: Replaced Item Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the service item component replaced by the item on the service line.

fields.name: Price Adjmt. Status
fields.tooltip:
Indicates whether the price on the service line was adjusted automatically or manually. The Adjusted value in the field denotes that the service price adjustment on the line was performed automatically. If the status is set to Modified, this means that you changed the service price adjustment amounts manually.
The program copies the information from the Price Adjmt. Status field on the service line of the service order. You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Line Discount Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of the line discount that is assigned to the service line.
If there are several discounts (warranty discount, contract discount and line discount) determined for the service line, the program selects the highest among them. Its percentage is specified in the Line Discount % field. In the Line Discount Type field, the program assigns the corresponding line discount type: Warranty Discount, Contract Discount, or Line Discount.
The program copies the information from the Line Discount Type field on the service line of the service order you post. You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Copy Components From
fields.tooltip:
Indicates where the components should be copied from to the component list when you replace a service item.
There are four options:


Field


Description


Item BOM

The component list is copied from the Item BOM.


Old Service Item

The components are copied from the Old Service Item.


Old Serv.Item w/o Serial No.

The components from the Old Service Item, but the serial number is not copied.


None

If selected, the component list for the new service item is not created.


The information is copied from the Copy Components From field on the service line of the service order that you post.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if a discounted will be applied to the current line.
The program retrieves the value from the Allow Line Disc. field on the service line of the service order.
You cannot change the value since the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the discount group code assigned to the bill-to customer. The code is used to calculate the service line discount given to the customer.
The code is copied from the Customer Disc. Group field on the service line of the service order.
You cannot change the customer discount group code in the posted shipment.
